panels.title: Worker FPS
panels.description: Frames captured per second (active gear ~5 fps, idle gear ~1 fps).

panels.title: Inference latency (ms)
panels.description: infer_ms_recent is the most-recent net.Detect() call. infer_ms_p95 is the 95th-percentile over the worker's last ~20 calls — the cleaner thermal-pressure signal.

panels.title: Dropped frames (rate / 5m)
panels.description: Cumulative Capture() failures. rate() over a 5-min window — sustained non-zero = RTSP / camera flakiness.

panels.title: MediaMTX restarts (rate / 5m)
panels.description: iter-26 watchdog kicks. Should be zero in healthy operation — rising = the camera pipeline keeps going dark and detect.py is recovering.

panels.title: Thumb encode latency (ms) — iter-187
panels.description: Wall-clock for save_thumb() (mkdir + jetson_utils.saveImage + retention sweep). Operator's signal for whether the iter-201 NVENC swap is worth doing.
